## Summary

Describe the change and why it matters for AI/GPU host observability.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tested on: (distro, kernel, GPU model)
- [ ] New metrics documented in docs/metrics.md
- [ ] New alert rules have runbook stubs in docs/runbooks/
- [ ] `make test` passes (syntax + bats)
- [ ] `make lint` passes (shellcheck + shfmt)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under [Unreleased]
- [ ] Signed-off-by line present (DCO)
